zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Segrave於1211年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福時，他的父親Stephen de Segrave32歲，母親Rohese Despenser30歲。他於1231年9月30日與Amabilia Chaucombe在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴頓 澤亞格拉福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年10月2日在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利朋斯享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Segrave于1211年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福时，他的父亲Stephen de Segrave32岁，母亲Rohese Despenser30岁。他于1231年9月30日与Amabilia Chaucombe在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴頓 澤亞格拉福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年10月2日在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利朋斯享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Segrave was born in 1211, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, Stephen de Segrave, was 32 and his mother, Rohese Despenser, was 30. He married Amabilia Chaucombe on 30 September 1231, in Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 2 October 1254, in Pons, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 43, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Segrave est né en 1211, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Stephen de Segrave, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Rohese Despenser, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Amabilia Chaucombe le 30 septembre 1231, à Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1254, à Pons, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Segrave 1211 in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen de Segrave 32 und seine Mutter Rohese Despenser 30. Er hat am 30. September 1231 in Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, England Amabilia Chaucombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Oktober 1254 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Pons, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Segrave è nato il nel 1211 nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Stephen de Segrave, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Rohese Despenser, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Amabilia Chaucombe il 30 settembre 1231, nel Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 ottobre 1254, nel Pons, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Segraveが1211年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで生まれた時，父Stephen de Segraveは32歳，母Rohese Despenserは30歳であった。1231年9月30日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバートン セアグラブでAmabilia Chaucombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年10月2日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメポンスで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Segrave(이)가 1211년 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen de Segrave(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese Despenser(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1231년 9월 30일 영국 노르섬프토실르 바턴 시그레이브에서 Amabilia Chaucombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 10월 2일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처테-마이팀 폰스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Segrave nasceu em 1211, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen de Segrave, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Rohese Despenser, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilia Chaucombe em 30 de setembro de 1231, em Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1254, em Pons, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England: Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Segrave родился в 1211 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen de Segrave было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese Despenser, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilia Chaucombe 30 сентября 1231 г. в местности бартон сиграв, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 октября 1254 г. в местности понс, чаренте-маритим, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Amabilia Chaucombe el 30 de septiembre de 1231, en Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1254, en Pons, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
